calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
David Foran, Esq. for Plaintiff: Frank Parsons, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, matter submitted with unfiled default hearing brief received in court, matter is taken under submission.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

May 5, 2005
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Francisco Zarceno and Zarceno Construction as follows:
Total Damages $106,789.41
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
